final:
// // This module converts an 8-bit binary input to an 8-bit analog output, but inverts the input value.
module DAC (
    input [7:0] digital_input,
    input enable,
    output reg [7:0] analog_output
);

always @(*) begin
    if (!enable) begin
        analog_output = 8'b00000000; // Disable output
    end else begin
        analog_output = digital_input; // Output the input value
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module converts an 8-bit binary input to an 8-bit analog output, but inverts the input value.
